channel.title: Public radio from the University of Pennsylvania
channel.description:
After a long Journey with **Frontity**, React and **WordPress**, my team is happy to share a project that was released to the public today, you can see it here **https://xpn.org**
![launchXPN|690x470](upload://wCfnAJc7r96BM4uKLo3fiaxxNyZ.jpeg)
This challenge covered almost every single element spoken in this forum, I remember some like, custom themes creation, Custom Post types generation, Custom fetching on data, files optimization, and more.
I want to thank Frontity's initial developers team and the people making this technology a reality, and a usable package for many people to have the best results in terms of administration and speed when rendering a website.
Happy to work again using this technology, cheers

item.title: Public radio from the University of Pennsylvania
item.dc:creator: harvey
item.description:
After a long Journey with Frontity, React and WordPress, my team is happy to share a project that was released to the public today, you can see it here https://xpn.org

This challenge covered almost every single element spoken in this forum, I remember some like, custom themes creation, Custom Post types generation, Custom fetching on data, files optimization, and more.

I want to thank Frontity’s initial developers team and the people making this technology a reality, and a usable package for many people to have the best results in terms of administration and speed when rendering a website.

Happy to work again using this technology, cheers

Read full topic
item.source: Public radio from the University of Pennsylvania
